page.content: In Table 1, the headers are A, B, C, and D, while the body rows labeled A through E contain the following values: Row A has no values; Row B has 1.225 in column A; Row C has 1.202 in column A and 1.365 in column B; Row D has 1.294 in column A, 1.429 in column B, and 0.924 in column C; Row E has 1.452 in column A, 1.628 in column B, 1.111 in column C, and 0.996 in column D. In Table 2, the headers are distance-only model, density-dependent population model, density-independent population model, estimated density dependence population model, full model, and single-infected city parameter model, with the following values: for DIC, the values are 880.4, 863.6, 844.5, 846.3, 846.4, and 841.9; for γ (distance power), the values are 0.90 (0.71, 1.07), 0.85 (0.66, 1.03), 1.14 (0.92, 1.34), 1.15 (0.93, 1.36), 1.18 (0.93, 1.40), and 1.18 (0.96, 1.39); for μ (susceptible population), the values are 0, 0.30 (0.15, 0.44), 0.36 (0.22, 0.51), 0.35 (0.19, 0.48), 0.40 (0.24, 0.53), and 0.40 (0.25, 0.54); for ν (infected population), the values are 0, 0.20 (0.01, 0.67), 0.14 (0, 0.48), 0.15 (0, 0.50), 0.22 (0.01, 0.60), and 0; for ɛ (spatial interaction), the values are 0, 0, 1, 0.90 (0.64, 1.21), 0.86 (0.55, 1.24), and 0.87 (0.61, 1.16); for φ (infectivity parameter), the values are 0, 0, 0, 0, 0.30 (0.06, 0.62), and 0.24 (0.03, 0.47); and finally, for β (intensity), the values are 0.0007 (0.006, 0.008), 0.0003 (0, 0.001), 0.04 (0.01, 0.17), 0.02 (0, 0.24), 0.15 (0.01, 2.44), and 0.11 (0.01, 1.01).
